content: Creation based on several files and folders is not available for this type of room. To create such a room, go to the {{sectionName}} section or use one of the PDF forms.

comment.text: This is a tooltip that appears when a user tries to create a room based on multiple files/folders, but the selected room type doesn't support it. It informs the user about alternative methods, with `{{sectionName}}` being a placeholder for the name of a section in the application.
